tags.name: UniRule
tags.description: The unified rule(UniRule) resource for automatic annotation in the UniProt Knowledgebase

tags.name: ARBA
tags.description: The Association-Rule-Based Annotator(ARBA) resource for automatic annotation in the UniProt Knowledgebase

get.summary: Get UniRule entry by a single accession.
get.description: Search UniRule entry by id to return all data associated with that entry. Specify <tt>fields</tt> to return only data for specific sections of that entry that are of interest to you

parameters.name: uniruleid
parameters.description: Get UniRule entry by an accession

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: List of entry sections (fields) to be returned, separated by commas. List of valid fields

get.summary: Download UniRule entries retrieved by a search query.
get.description: The stream endpoint uses a request query to return all entries associated with the search term in a single download. Specify <tt>fields</tt> to return only data for specific sections of that entry that are of interest to you

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Criteria to search UniRule. Advanced queries can be built with parentheses and conditionals such as AND, OR and NOT. List of valid search fields

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Specify field by which to sort results. List of valid sort fields

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: List of entry sections (fields) to be returned, separated by commas. List of valid fields

parameters.name: download
parameters.description: Specify <tt>true</tt> to download as file, default is <tt>false</tt>.

get.summary: Retrieve UniRule entries by a search query.
get.description: The search endpoint uses a request query to return all entries associated with the search term in a paginated list of entries. Use ‘size’ to specify the number of entries per page of results. Specify <tt>fields</tt> to return only data for specific sections of that entry that are of interest to you

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Criteria to search UniRule. Advanced queries can be built with parentheses and conditionals such as AND, OR and NOT. List of valid search fields

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Specify field by which to sort results. List of valid sort fields

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: List of entry sections (fields) to be returned, separated by commas. List of valid fields

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Specify the number of entries per page of results (Pagination size). Default is 25, max is 500

get.summary: Get ARBA entry by a single accession.
get.description: Search ARBA entry by id to return all data associated with that entry. Specify <tt>fields</tt> to return only data for specific sections of that entry that are of interest to you

parameters.name: arbaId

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: List of entry sections (fields) to be returned, separated by commas. List of valid fields

parameters.name: query

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Specify field by which to sort results. List of valid sort fields

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: List of entry sections (fields) to be returned, separated by commas. List of valid fields

parameters.name: download
parameters.description: Specify <tt>true</tt> to download as file, default is <tt>false</tt>.

Use ‘size’ to specify the number of entries per page of results. Specify <tt>fields</tt> to return only data for specific sections of that entry that are of interest to you
